title: viola × godlewskii
intro: Viola × godlewskii, also known as the hybrid viola, is a cross between Viola alba and Viola riviniana, and it belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). The medicinal properties of Viola × godlewskii include its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as support immune function and skin health. In herbal preparations, Viola × godlewskii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it can also be used in skincare products due to its soothing and moisturizing properties.
